g.text: GOOD: DECOMPOSE BY BUSINESS CAPABILITY / SUBDOMAIN

text.tspan: Problem: adding a feature 'show order discounts' requires changes
in EVERY team. Coordination meeting. Long lead time. Conway's-Law disaster.
Each team owns its slice end-to-end: API, business logic, DB, deploy.
'Add discount field' u2192 only the Orders team changes anything.
Features ship in days instead of weeks.
